apps.name: Venera
apps.subtitle: A cross-platform manga/comic reader
apps.localizedDescription: Venera is a cross-platform manga/comic reader.

versions.localizedDescription:
## What's Changed

### Added
- WebDAV online comic library: read comics directly from a remote directory online; reuses your existing WebDAV settings automatically when not configured separately
- QR-code sync: config now saves and takes effect immediately after scanning, no manual save needed
- Custom desktop app icon with three built-in presets to switch between
- New "Test Connection" button in the WebDAV settings dialog

### Changed
- Added a collapsible "WebDAV Sync" group in Settings that gathers sync, logs, and comic library options; setting groups are now unified as collapsible headers with icons
- Redesigned the detail page with an edge-to-edge layout, a main area that adapts to window width, and larger, better-proportioned reading buttons on wide screens
- Renamed "Disclaimer" to "User Agreement & Disclaimer"

### Fixed
- Fixed the night-view toggle being overwritten across devices when restoring a backup (#125)
- Fixed the multitasking view showing the old app name
- Fixed clearing the reading history list also wiping per-chapter reading progress
- Fixed some images failing to load in the WebDAV comic library
- Fixed the About page description text touching the screen edges (#119)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/VeneraX/compare/v2.1.9...v2.1.10

## What's Changed

### Added
- Customizable tap zones: set each screen edge (top / bottom / left / right) to previous page, next page, or none
- Continuous mode: option to vertically center a short page after turning
- Continuous mode: adjustable spacing between images

### Changed
- The app has been renamed to VeneraX with a new logo

### Fixed
- Seamless chapter reading: fixed tap-to-turn reloading the page after scrolling
- Seamless chapter reading: fixed tap-to-turn not crossing into the next chapter on the join page
- Fixed center-on-turn only turning a single page in continuous mode

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/VeneraX/compare/v2.1.8...v2.1.9

## What's Changed

### Added
- WebDAV sync frequency now offers three modes: real-time, data-saving, and manual-only
- The number of WebDAV backups to keep is now configurable

### Changed
- More reliable cross-device sync of read / unread marks for followed updates: the more recent side wins, so marking as read on one device clears the unread mark on others

### Fixed
- Fixed a crash after importing data or syncing via WebDAV
- Fixed backups not being created after enabling automatic sync
- Fixed the "finished" mark not showing in the top-left corner after reading all chapters in continuous scroll mode
- Fixed Traditional/Simplified Chinese conversion not working in some cases

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/venera/compare/v2.1.7...v2.1.8

## What's Changed

### Added
- App lock now supports PIN, password, and pattern unlock, so devices without biometric hardware can still protect the app.
- Reading display settings now include a comment font size option.
- When a chapter fails to load, you can now tap to retry.

### Fixed
- Fixed a translucent/white bar appearing at the bottom of the screen on some devices.
- Fixed an occasional crash on restart after syncing.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/venera/compare/v2.1.6...v2.1.7

## What's Changed

### Changed
- Cover images can now be un-favorited directly by swiping or tapping
- WebDAV now keeps up to 10 backups per platform
- Updated the disclaimer text

### Fixed
- Fixed an issue that could cause the app to crash
- Fixed cramped UI layout at some screen resolutions

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/venera/compare/v2.1.5...v2.1.6

## What's Changed

### Added
- WebDAV backups now keep the 3 most recent per platform and automatically clean up older ones

### Changed
- Smoother experience when dragging the list scrollbar

### Fixed
- Fix dropped frames when turning pages quickly and stutter when the keyboard pops up in the reader (#107)
- Fix swipe-to-favorite triggering too easily (edge back gestures and diagonal scrolling no longer set it off)
- Fix notification cards sometimes not disappearing after a background task finishes (#84)
- Fix an occasional crash when a cloud backup was applied before startup finished
- Fix settings possibly being fully reset when the process is killed by the system
- Fix key data files getting corrupted on abnormal interruption, with fault-tolerant loading when data is damaged
- Fix download resume failing outright when its state file was corrupted, instead of re-downloading
- Fix the follow-updates list not refreshing during a check, and unread update marks being lost after a data restore (#106)
- Fix timestamps in task records not shown in the local format

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/venera/compare/v2.1.4...v2.1.5

## What's Changed

### Added
- Draggable scrollbar on the comic detail page for quick navigation (useful when a source shows a full preview there)
- Local comic export now shows detailed progress for the packaging and folder-writing stages, so it no longer looks stuck at the end
- New guide to ignore battery optimization, reducing background tasks (follow-updates / sync / import-export) being frozen by the system
- One-tap entry to the album view from an image-favorite list item
- New toggle for whether WebDAV sync goes through the proxy
- New option to automatically clean up old reading history

### Fixed
- Fix stale data overwriting newer data and reverting your library when syncing across multiple devices
- Fix a crash from high memory use when exporting a large comic library as a merged file
- Fix a possible crash when syncing images of a large library over WebDAV
- Fix theme color and other appearance settings needing a restart to take effect after a WebDAV restore
- Fix page-turn gestures being hard to trigger when swiping quickly in the reader
- Fix a crash from accidentally triggering favorite while scrolling on the chapter comments page
- Fix the Android system back gesture occasionally going back twice and skipping the detail page
- Fix the "All" section on the downloads page not showing in-progress downloads on first open
- Fix downloads failing when the storage folder was not writable (permission is now requested as needed)
- Fix manual import/export and WebDAV image sync interfering with each other when run at the same time

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/venera/compare/v2.1.3...v2.1.4

## What's Changed

### Added
- Settings page now supports keyword search
- Swipe left on local favorites to unfavorite
- Draggable scrollbar on long list pages for quick navigation

### Fixed
- Fix search results not refreshing after removing a favorite in search mode
- Fix backup rotation sometimes deleting the newest backup instead of the oldest
- Fix background sync being frozen by the system and missing its notification card
- Fix long-press on list card tags accidentally copying text (long-press copy now only works on the detail page)
- Fill in missing translations in settings, update dialog, and other places for non-Chinese languages

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/venera/compare/v2.1.2...v2.1.3

## What's Changed

### Added
- Download the current chapter or the whole comic with one tap from inside the reader
- Download page now supports pause / resume / cancel all, per-task pause, resume and retry, drag-to-reorder, and estimated time remaining
- New "Wi-Fi only download" switch that auto-pauses on metered networks and resumes on Wi-Fi
- New optional "parallel downloads" setting
- A notification when all downloads finish
- A clear warning when there isn't enough disk space to download
- Unfinished downloads now resume automatically after restarting the app
- Migrate WebDAV sync settings via QR code
- Long-press to copy info on the comic detail page (author, tags, and more)
- The WebDAV sync-failure dialog now has a "Retry" button to re-sync directly

### Changed
- Bottom navigation selected item now uses a rounded-rectangle highlight
- The folder rename dialog is now pre-filled with the current name for quick edits
- Keywords from aggregated search are now also saved to search history
- The sync-config QR code now pops up instantly, with a refreshed interface

### Fixed
- Fixed an occasional crash on iOS at startup
- Fixed WebDAV sync sometimes hanging / becoming unresponsive on iOS
- Fixed the WebDAV auto-sync switch being reset under an empty config, and an empty config still triggering an upload
- Fixed downloads getting stuck on the whole queue when one failed or was cancelled
- Added integrity checks for downloaded images, rejecting corrupted / truncated images and retrying
- Fixed update marks occasionally being lost when cancelling a follow-update check
- Cancelled follow-update tasks now disappear from the list immediately
- Fixed the left-swipe-to-favorite and right-swipe-to-go-back gestures conflicting and triggering an accidental back
- Fixed the sidebar logo not aligning with the home search box

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/venera/compare/v2.1.1...v2.1.2

## What's Changed

### Added
- Search results now support multi-select batch favoriting, and you can swipe a single result to favorite it quickly

### Changed
- Tasks page: background tasks such as WebDAV sync now show unified titles and status, with options to manage and clear task history
- Reading settings: a new collapsible "Gesture settings" section groups Double-tap zoom, Long-press zoom, Long-press zoom position, and Volume-key page turning

### Fixed
- Fixed imported local comics not showing their cover on the details and history pages
- Fixed garbled / incorrect Chinese text on some Android devices (e.g. ColorOS 16)
- Smoother loading when opening the History / Follow-Updates pages
- Clearing history now clears records for all task types
- Fixed the paused-task icon and stutter on the tasks page

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/venera/compare/v2.1.0...v2.1.1

## What's Changed

### Added
- Multiple source libraries: subscribe to several catalogs at once and manage them on a dedicated page
- Source library manager: add, edit, delete, reorder (priority), enable/disable, browse and install per library
- Each installed source now shows which library it came from
- Switch a source to another library's variant, with the offered version shown for each library before you confirm
- Night mode can follow the system dark mode and toggle automatically
- History and Read Later support swipe-to-delete

### Changed
- Reworked the comic source page and the home source card into a cleaner card / single-line layout
- Source updates are now bound to the library a source was installed from, so a different maintainer's catalog can no longer push the wrong update
- Comic import keeps running in the background
- Follow-update checks keep running in the background and resume across restarts

### Fixed
- Fixed single-source update still downloading the old address after a source list migration
- Improved the message when a source download address cannot be resolved, and avoided cached update checks
- Fixed night mode color and intensity not being adjustable while following the system
- Fixed an illegal setState during startup when syncing night mode

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/venera/compare/v2.0.12...v2.1.0

## What's Changed

### Added
- iOS install via AltStore: the app is published as an AltStore source that auto-updates on every release
- First-run disclaimer with a consent gate before the app can be used
- Local comic export is now a resumable background task (pick a target folder, one file per comic)
- Export option to merge a comic into a single package
- Folder import now also accepts `.venera_comics`
- Backup import now shows progress, runs in the background, and is hardened for large files
- Web PWA: read-later support, aligned with the app

### Changed
- Android keeps downloads running in the background; Windows can minimize to the system tray

### Fixed
- Fixed a crash on the explore page when a multi-section page failed to load
- Deleting an installed source now clears its saved login and data, so reinstalling starts clean without auto-login
- Fixed wrong covers when batch-downloading comics
- Fixed image favorites showing the wrong image (the cache key was missing the page)
- Fixed read-later write/import crashes caused by legacy database tables
- Fixed a backup list/download crash for backups named with a millisecond timestamp
- Hardened the background download keep-alive notification refresh
- Fixed the Windows tray switch needing a restart to take effect
- Web PWA: fixed continuous-reader chapter reload, title sync and arrow-key scrolling, history/read-later detail resolution, card labels, and resume-to-last-page

### Build / CI
- Added the AltStore source manifest with a generator script and tests; releases now refresh it automatically
- Fixed the Linux release build failing to package after the new tray feature, by installing the ayatana appindicator dependency in CI
- Updated the disclaimer wording in README

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/venera/compare/v2.0.11...v2.0.12

## What's Changed

### Added
- Source migration dialog now shows linked sources at the top for quick migration without search
- Comic detail page shows linked sources and migration suggestions when loading fails
- Image favorites now supports "by comic grid" view with single-comic image grid management

### Changed
- Source migration dialog redesigned with two paths: quick migration (linked sources) and search migration (other sources)
- Linked sources displayed as collapsible cards with cover, title, author, and source name
- Migration dialog now uses radio selection for linked sources (select one to migrate directly)
- Enhanced reader performance: increased cacheExtent for continuous scroll mode and expanded prefetch window for slide mode

### Fixed
- Fixed source migration dialog: selecting search result now properly clears linked source selection
- Fixed search results expansion state lost when scrolling in migration dialog
- Fixed ExpansionTile divider lines appearing globally when expanded
- Fixed task card extra borders at top and bottom when expanded
- Fixed Android custom storage path stuck when selecting non-empty directory, added copy integrity protection
- Fixed follow updates check flooding warnings when source fails, now degrades to warning level
- Fixed read-later write failure due to missing columns in old database
- Fixed local comic directory import metadata and cover parsing failure under Android SAF

### Build / CI
- Updated disclaimer in README to explicitly cover software modification scenarios
- Fixed Windows build compatibility with MSVC 14.51+ by silencing experimental coroutine deprecation warnings

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Kyosee/venera/compare/v2.0.10...v2.0.11
